title: BEM-843 execute after 842
objective:

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:03 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem842_verify_real_response_after_retry.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
if ps=='real_claude_response_found':
    status='process_real_response_selected'
    next_action='parse real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
elif ps=='runtime_present_but_real_response_missing':
    status='patch_response_writer_selected'
    # strengthen prompt and dispatch again
    mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem843_force_real_claude_response.md')
    mail.write_text('# BEM-843 | FORCE REAL CLAUDE RESPONSE'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: runtime exists but no valid response was accepted. Write a real response file to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem843_claude_real_response.md. Required exact markers: CLAUDE RESPONSE, Decision: APPROVED or CHANGE_REQUIRED or BLOCKED. Include architecture/protocol agreement points. Do not write issue comments. Do not create runtime blocker file.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem843_force_real_response_dispatch.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-843 force real Claude response because runtime exists but response missing','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    next_action='fresh tick and verify real response file'
elif ps=='dispatch_results_present_but_runtime_missing':
    status='patch_dispatcher_runtime_selected'
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem843_runtime_state_dispatch.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-843 repair Claude runtime state after dispatch result','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    next_action='fresh tick and verify runtime state'
else:
    status='patch_dispatch_queue_processing_selected'
    next_action='inspect queue processor and remaining queue item; dispatch queue likely not processed'
state={'bem':'BEM-843','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem843_execute_after_bem842.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem843_execute_after_bem842.md').write_text('# BEM-843 | Execute After BEM-842 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-843'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem843_execute_after_bem842.json','governance/reports/bem843_execute_after_bem842.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
for p in ['governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem843_force_real_claude_response.md','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem843_force_real_response_dispatch.json','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem843_runtime_state_dispatch.json']:
    if Path(p).exists(): changed.append(p)
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-842 route: process response if found, force real Claude response if runtime exists, or repair runtime/dispatch path')
